name: yolfi-agent
description: Add Yolfi crypto checkout, paylinks, webhooks, and payment verification with browser-based agent authorization.

interface.shortDescription: Build and operate Yolfi crypto payment flows.
interface.longDescription: Authorize an AI agent with Yolfi, then create paylinks, configure settlement wallets and signed webhooks, and verify payment status through MCP tools and a reusable integration skill.
defaultPrompt: Connect this project to Yolfi and implement a production-ready crypto checkout flow.
Create or reuse a Yolfi paylink and add verified webhook handling to this application.
Audit this project's Yolfi payment integration and verify the end-to-end payment flow.
